hero.headline: The fix-it team *Tampa homeowners* keep on speed dial
hero.subheadline: From outlets to attic ladders to pressure washing — we handle the whole list in one visit.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: One call handles it all
services_section.subheading: Why juggle three contractors when we can knock out your entire list?

services.title: General Repairs & Maintenance
services.description: Outlets, fixtures, small plumbing fixes, filter changes — all the items on your honey-do list handled by one reliable team.

services.title: Home Prep & Move-In Ready
services.description: Vent cleaning, outlet replacement, safety checks — everything you need to turn a new house into your home.

services.title: Pressure Washing & Exterior Care
services.description: Driveways, walkways, and outdoor surfaces restored to like-new condition. We even handle car detailing.

services.title: Specialty Installations
services.description: Attic ladders, gate hardware, shutter reattachment — the projects that need both skill and the right tools.

services.title: HOA & Property Maintenance
services.description: Multi-unit repairs, common area fixes, and ongoing maintenance programs for property managers and associations.

about.heading: Built for Tampa's real home repair needs
about.body: We're the team Tampa homeowners call when they need multiple jobs done right the first time. Whether you're moving into a new place, tackling a growing to-do list, or managing property maintenance, our multi-trade expertise means fewer phone calls and faster results. Sebastian, Russ, Ja'mario and the crew have earned 25 five-star reviews by showing up prepared and getting it done.

reviews.name: Kate G.
reviews.text: Needed help getting our new home move-in ready. They cleaned vents, replaced outlets, and made sure everything was perfect. Couldn't recommend them more highly.

reviews.name: Caroline S.
reviews.text: Had a whole list of tasks — filters, vents, small plumbing repairs. Instead of calling three different services, they handled everything in one visit.

reviews.name: Ken R.
reviews.text: Did several HOA repairs for us — shutters, light fixtures, gate work. Very easy to work with and everything was done to our satisfaction. We'll use them again.

reviews.name: Christina
reviews.text: Ja'mario pressure-washed our driveway and even detailed my car — got out makeup and sunscreen stains! Professional and detail-oriented work.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Tampa Bay
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout the metro area

cta.heading: Ready to cross everything off your list?
cta.body: Send us your to-do list and we'll give you one price for the whole job. No more juggling multiple contractors.
